archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy / Trust) with Dashboard Clarity
rationale: Immigration workflows require trust, clarity, and authority. We use the user's requested Teal (#2a777a) as the primary action color and Orange (#f7620b) for accents. To fix the rendering issue and elevate the UI, we abandon emoji flags in favor of high-quality SVG flags (react-world-flags). The layout shifts to a structured Bento 'Control Room' grid to manage the complexity of visas, forms, and workflows.

typography.strategy: Manrope for clear, approachable headings with tight tracking. IBM Plex Sans for body text to give a 'document/official' feel that suits immigration.
typography.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900 font-['Manrope']
typography.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-slate-500 font-['Manrope']

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Control Room Grid. Utilize generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards to prevent clutter. Use a subtle off-white background for the main canvas to make white surfaces pop.
layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
layout_and_spacing.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.grid_countries: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

navigation.strategy: Use a clear tabbed interface or pill-navigation at the top of the workflow builder to switch between views (Gallery, Pick-visa, Review, Saved).

flags.instruction: REPLACE all emoji flags with SVG components using 'react-world-flags'. Emojis render inconsistently. Provide the 2-letter ISO code to the Flag component.
flags.style: w-8 h-6 rounded-sm shadow-sm object-cover border border-slate-100

country_card.style: Flex row layout. Left: SVG Flag (w-10 h-10 rounded-full border border-slate-100 object-cover), Right: Country Name (font-semibold text-slate-800). Add a subtle background hover effect (hover:bg-teal-50/50 hover:border-[#2a777a]/30 transition-all cursor-pointer p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200).

template_card.style: Bento style card. Add an 'Orange' badge (bg-[#f7620b]/10 text-[#f7620b] font-bold text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded) for 'Verified'. Highlight template name and country.

review_view.layout: Two-column layout (lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8). Left column (span 2): Workflow steps in a vertical timeline/stepper. Right column: Sticky summary card with Product Name input, Fees, and Save/Download actions.
review_view.verification_banner: bg-teal-50 border border-teal-200 text-teal-900 p-4 rounded-lg flex items-start gap-3 mb-6. Use a ShieldCheck icon to denote verified status.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2a777a] text-white hover:bg-[#215f62] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold transition-colors shadow-sm shadow-teal-900/10 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2a777a] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-200
buttons.accent: bg-[#f7620b] text-white hover:bg-[#d95509] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold transition-colors shadow-sm shadow-orange-900/10

motion.hover: Subtle transform (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increase on cards.
motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons, cards, and inputs.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: Run 'yarn add react-world-flags @phosphor-icons/react' in the frontend directory.
2. REPLACE EMOJI FLAGS: Map all 51 countries to their ISO alpha-2 codes and use the <Flag /> component from react-world-flags instead of emojis.
3. IMPLEMENT FONTS: Add Google Fonts link for 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to index.html or index.css, and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
4. UPDATE COLORS: Add the custom primary (#2a777a) and accent (#f7620b) colors to tailwind.config.js.
5. REDESIGN GALLERY VIEW: Build a clean grid of country cards using the 'country_card' style guidelines.
6. REDESIGN REVIEW VIEW: Structure the review step with a clear left-side timeline (steps/docs) and a right-side sticky summary card.
7. TESTING ATTRIBUTES: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements as per guidelines (e.g. data-testid='country-card-US').
